name: Beans & Eggs
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Sausage links, cut into half-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a pan; remove from the pan.
2. Saute the onion in oil until translucent.
3. Add beans, sausage, catsup, water, and seasonings to the pan.
4. Simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
5. Cook eggs as desired.
6. Arrange the bean mixture on a platter with eggs, avocado slices, and orange slices. Makes 6 servings.
